creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
Don't blame ATF.

I run into the same issues on amd64 once I install new system headers and a new libc, not before then.

I've added a source file and I can point you to a core if you need one, but compiling fmemopen2_test.c like the following should work as well:

cc -O0 -g -Wall -o fmemopen2_test fmemopen2_test.c
